info.title: MeisterTask API
info.description: MeisterTask REST API for managing projects, sections, tasks, checklists, comments, attachments, labels, custom fields, work intervals, and more.

post.summary: Add a member to a project

delete.summary: Remove a member from a project

post.summary: Create a section in a project
Create a task in a section

get.summary: List all tasks in a project
List all tasks across all projects

post.summary: Create a comment on a task
Upload an attachment to a task
Create a checklist on a task

get.summary: Get a checklist item by ID

post.summary: Create a label in a project
Add a label to a task

delete.summary: Remove a label from a task

get.summary: List work intervals for a task

post.summary: Create a work interval on a task

get.summary: List custom fields on a task

post.summary: Set a custom field value on a task

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 bearer token. Obtain via MindMeister OAuth 2.0 flows with scopes: userinfo.profile, userinfo.email, meistertask

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing bearer token
